ogTitle: Shellharbour vs Shelly Beach: Climate Safety

heading: Shellharbour vs Shelly Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shellharbour, New South Wales and Shelly Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shellharbour and Shelly Beach have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Shellharbour or Shelly Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shellharbour has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Shelly Beach scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shellharbour scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Shelly Beach scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shellharbour or Shelly Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shellharbour has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
